name: YugabyteDB
description: PostgreSQL-compatible distributed SQL database for cloud-native applications with high availability and global scale

license.comment: Core database is Apache 2.0. Managed service binaries use Polyform Free Trial License 1.0.0.

hosting-options.comment: YugabyteDB Aeon is the official managed DBaaS. Available on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Also supports self-hosted and bring-your-own-cloud deployments.

initial-release.comment: Repository created October 2017. First public release in 2017.

primary-language.comment: Primarily C (30.6%) and C++ (24.0%). Storage layer (DocDB) is C++.

data-model.comment: PostgreSQL-compatible relational model via YSQL. Also offers Cassandra-compatible YCQL API for wide-column workloads.

topology.comment: Uses Raft consensus protocol. Each tablet (shard) has a leader that handles reads/writes, with followers for replication.

sharding.comment: Supports both hash and range sharding. Automatic tablet splitting when tablets grow. Default is hash-based partitioning.

replication-factor.comment: Default replication factor is 3 for fault tolerance. Configurable per table or globally.

multi-region.comment: Native support for geo-distributed deployments with xCluster replication, tablespace-based geo-partitioning, and read replicas.

cap-position.comment: Strongly consistent (CP). Prioritizes consistency over availability during network partitions.

consistency-model.comment: Provides strong consistency. Supports serializable and snapshot isolation. Linearizable for single-key operations when clocks are synchronized.

acid-transactions.comment: Full ACID transaction support across distributed data. Inspired by Google Spanner architecture.

transaction-scope.comment: Transactions can span multiple tablets, tables, and nodes across the entire cluster.

isolation-levels.comment: YSQL supports Serializable, Snapshot (Repeatable Read), and Read Committed. Default is Snapshot. YCQL supports Snapshot only.

distributed-transactions.comment: Uses Raft consensus and hybrid logical clocks for distributed transaction coordination.

query-language.comment: YSQL (PostgreSQL-compatible SQL) and YCQL (Cassandra Query Language compatible).

sql-compatibility.comment: PostgreSQL wire protocol compatible. Reuses the PostgreSQL query layer. Currently rebased to PostgreSQL 15.

secondary-indexes.comment: Full support for secondary indexes in both YSQL and YCQL. Online index builds supported.

joins.comment: Full distributed JOIN support through PostgreSQL query layer compatibility.

full-text-search.comment: PostgreSQL-compatible full-text search with TSVECTOR/TSQUERY inherited from PostgreSQL query layer.

max-cluster-size.comment: 100-node cluster tested with linear scalability in AWS benchmarks.

write-throughput.comment: 100-node cluster on AWS c5.4xlarge instances achieved 1.26M inserts/sec with 3x replication and 1.66ms average latency.

read-latency-p99.comment: 0.56ms average read latency in 100-node benchmark. 2.8M reads/sec achieved.

auto-scaling.comment: K8s operator supports transparent scale out/in. YugabyteDB Aeon managed service auto-scales.

hot-spot-handling.comment: Automatic tablet splitting and load balancing. Smart drivers distribute connections across nodes.

zero-downtime-upgrades.comment: Rolling upgrades supported. New v2025.1 supports in-place online upgrades and downgrades including PostgreSQL major version changes.

online-schema-changes.comment: Online index builds supported. Schema changes can be performed without blocking concurrent writes.

point-in-time-recovery.comment: PITR with microsecond precision. Fast operation (seconds). Supports time-travel queries within retention period.

backup-strategy.comment: Distributed snapshots, incremental backups, and CDC-based replication supported.

kubernetes-operator.comment: Official Kubernetes operator supporting deployments, upgrades, backups, and restores via CRDs.

rust-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB smart driver for Rust. Also works with rust-postgres via PostgreSQL compatibility.

go-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB PGX Smart Driver (v4) with cluster-aware load balancing.

java-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB JDBC Smart Driver (42.7.3-yb-4) with topology awareness and connection load balancing.

dotnet-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB smart driver for C#. Also works with Npgsql via PostgreSQL compatibility.

python-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB Psycopg2 Smart Driver (2.9.3) with cluster-aware load balancing.

ruby-driver.comment: Official YugabyteDB smart driver for Ruby with topology awareness.

c-cpp-driver.comment: Official C/C++ driver support. Works with libpq via PostgreSQL wire protocol.

orm-support.comment: Full support for Hibernate, SQLAlchemy, Prisma, GORM, Sequelize, and ActiveRecord via PostgreSQL compatibility.

open-source.comment: Core database and all enterprise features are Apache 2.0 licensed. Fully open source.

free-tier.comment: 14-day free trial for YugabyteDB Aeon managed service.

pricing-model.comment: Credit-based pricing (100 Consumption Units = $1). Tiers: Starter, Professional, Enterprise. Storage and data transfer additional.

cost-estimate-small.comment: Credit-based consumption model. Contact sales for committed pricing. Self-hosted is free.

stackoverflow-tags.comment: Unable to retrieve exact count from Stack Overflow. YugabyteDB has an active presence on Stack Overflow as a community support channel.

change-data-capture.comment: Built-in CDC using Debezium connector. Supports Kafka, PostgreSQL logical replication. At-least-once delivery guarantee.
